items.title: US pauses $14bn weapons sale to Taiwan due to Iran war
items.dek: US acting navy chief Hung Cao told a Senate hearing they were "doing a pause" on the sale to make sure they had munitions for the Iran war.
items.body: US acting navy chief Hung Cao told a Senate hearing they were "doing a pause" on the sale to make sure they had munitions for the Iran war.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US sanctions Tanzanian police official over 'torture' of rights activists
items.dek: The sanctions come amid growing scrutiny of Tanzania’s human rights record in recent years.
items.body: The sanctions come amid growing scrutiny of Tanzania’s human rights record in recent years.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Australian man dies after falling down ravine on hike to Machu Picchu
items.dek: The body of Matthew Cameron Paton, 53, was found on Thursday, about 300m down a steep slope.
items.body: The body of Matthew Cameron Paton, 53, was found on Thursday, about 300m down a steep slope.
items.author: IriLine Desk
